title: API created event doesn't sync with Google Calendar
excerpt:
Hey, 
We have a date column, which is connected to our Google Calendar. 
When an event created manually it is automatically created in Google Calendar. 
But if we create an event via API it will not sync with our Calenda…

posts.author: bogdan_wlcm (Bogdan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
We have a date column, which is connected to our Google Calendar.
When an event created manually it is automatically created in Google Calendar.
But if we create an event via API it will not sync with our Calendar until we manually change the date column.
How can we make it work?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @bogdan_wlcm,

How are you connecting the date column with Google Calendar?

posts.author: bogdan_wlcm (Bogdan)

posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

I will need you to please send an email to support@monday.com with this information and image, so that we can take a closer look from there. Please mention that Matias (Developer Success Engineer at monday.com) suggests taking this with the “boards core technical support team”. The person who gets your email will know where to route it

Looking forward to hearing from you via email!

Cheers,
Matias
